title: schoenus × scheuchzeri
intro: Schoenus × scheuchzeri, also known as the hybrid club-rush, is a plant species derived from the cross-pollination of Schoenus ferrugineus and Schoenus nigricans. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Schoenus × scheuchzeri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being applied topically to wounds and skin irritations.
